properties.title: Tehran — Air Defense Systems
properties.description: Air defense infrastructure targeted on the outskirts of the capital. Significant radar installations reported destroyed.

properties.title: Mashhad — Military Installation
properties.description: Strike on a military base near the Turkmenistan border. Infrastructure damage confirmed.

properties.title: Ahvaz — Fuel Depot
properties.description: Petroleum storage facility struck in Khuzestan province. Fire visible for several hours.

properties.title: Bandar Abbas — Naval Base
properties.description: Port infrastructure and naval assets targeted. Significant strategic impact on Strait of Hormuz operations.

properties.title: Western Iran — Supply Route
properties.description: Road and bridge infrastructure along a key western supply corridor disrupted.

properties.title: Shiraz — Command Center
properties.description: Military command and communications facility hit in Fars province.

properties.title: Tehran exclusion zone
properties.description: Air defense suppression zone established following January strikes.

properties.title: Khuzestan conflict zone
properties.description: Southern oil province affected by strike activity from May 2025.
